'''lafudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rkt|rkt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rkt|rkt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lafudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læfidhith|læfidhith]] || [[word:læfidhij|læfidhij]] || [[word:læfidhish|læfidhish]] || [[word:læfidhi|læfidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lafufudhuth|lafufudhuth]] || [[word:lafufudhuj|lafufudhuj]] || [[word:lafufudhush|lafufudhush]] || [[word:lafufudhu|lafufudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lafudhuth|lafudhuth]] || [[word:lafudhuj|lafudhuj]] || [[word:lafudhush|lafudhush]] || [[word:lafudhu|lafudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lafufdhuth|lafufdhuth]] || [[word:lafufdhuj|lafufdhuj]] || [[word:lafufdhush|lafufdhush]] || [[word:lafufdhuf|lafufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lafudhuthu|lafudhuthu]] || [[word:lafudhuju|lafudhuju]] || [[word:lafudhushu|lafudhushu]] || [[word:lafudhuku|lafudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lafudhuth|lafudhuth]] || [[word:lafudhuj|lafudhuj]] || [[word:lafudhush|lafudhush]] || [[word:lafudhu|lafudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lafudhuthul|lafudhuthul]] || [[word:lafudhujul|lafudhujul]] || [[word:lafudhushul|lafudhushul]] || [[word:lafudhukul|lafudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lafudhuthuthu|lafudhuthuthu]] || [[word:lafudhujuju|lafudhujuju]] || [[word:lafudhushushu|lafudhushushu]] || [[word:lafudhuku|lafudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lafudhuthun|lafudhuthun]] || [[word:lafudhujun|lafudhujun]] || [[word:lafudhushun|lafudhushun]] || [[word:lafudhukun|lafudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lafudhuthuoro|lafudhuthuoro]] || [[word:lafudhujuoro|lafudhujuoro]] || [[word:lafudhushuoro|lafudhushuoro]] || [[word:lafudhukuoro|lafudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
